title: Local variable access in fork..join_none - recent breakage
body:
Hello,
  The SVA + SVUnit + Verilator code that worked for last few weeks seems now broken with an error as below (in latest build)

```log
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: ../src/AXI/axi4_lite//test_a_af_axi_errm_awburst.sv:47:48: Unsupported: variable local to a forking process accessed in a fork..join_any or fork..join_none
   47 |             if (svunit_ut.get_error_count() == local_error_count) begin
      |                                                ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```

Error reported from:
```sh
Verilator 5.009 devel rev UNKNOWN.REV (mod)
```
Previous build where it worked:
```log
Verilator 5.009 devel rev v5.008-91-g0b96789e6
```
Should I assume the latest error is indeed true and hence I need to update SVUnit code? 

Thanks
